summary: The docs visual-QA evidence bundle is ready, but the built page manifest still needs live visual inspection for layout and typography defects.

artifacts.name: MkDocs build log
artifacts.summary: Captured stdout and stderr from uv run mkdocs build --strict.

artifacts.name: Visual target manifest
artifacts.summary: Lists the public pages to inspect, their built HTML paths, and the image assets resolved from those pages.

steps.name: mkdocs_build
steps.summary: The public docs built successfully with uv run mkdocs build --strict.
steps.guidance: If you need a live preview, serve the site directory locally and inspect the listed pages in Codex.

steps.name: page_manifest
steps.summary: The built page and asset manifest is complete, but the public docs still require live visual review for layout issues.
steps.guidance: Open the built HTML pages from the manifest in Codex and look for broken images, clipped text, and layout regressions.
